title: FULLY FREE Unlimited API + OpenCode: MiniMax M3,Step 3.7 Flash,Nemotron 3 Ultra,GLM,Kimi!
summary: OpenRouter has launched Fusion API, a compound model system that routes prompts to multiple models and uses a judge model to synthesize responses. The service claims Fable-level performance based on DRACO Bench results, but real-world testing reveals inconsistent results, slower performance, and higher costs than single-model alternatives.
writeup: The video examines OpenRouter's Fusion API, a compound model system that routes a prompt to multiple models and uses a judge model to synthesize a single response. It situates the service against claims of Fable-level performance drawn from DRACO Bench results. The hands-on testing finds the approach falls short in practice: inconsistent outputs, slower responses, and higher costs than single-model alternatives. The takeaway is that ensemble routing and test-time composition do not automatically beat picking one capable model directly.
